'''Qrrrl Toq's starship''' was the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] given to [[Qrrrl Toq]] at [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] which he used to pursue [[Aleema Keto]] and [[Crado]] into the [[Cron Cluster/Legends|Cron Cluster]]. When Aleema detonated the Cluster, Qrrrl was killed in his vessel.<ref name="TOTJ4" />

{{Ship-stub}}

*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 4]]
